items.name: Government-Issued Items
items.whyNeeded: The Army issues everything you need. Don't bring more than allowed.
items.selectionTips: Do not purchase uniforms or boots before arrival — wait to be issued.

items.name: Personal Hygiene Kit
items.selectionTips: Unscented deodorant. Travel-size everything. No aerosols.

recommendedProducts.name: Army Basic Training Hygiene Kit
recommendedProducts.reason: Pre-assembled to BCT standards so you pass hygiene inspections from day one without guessing what to bring.

items.name: Athletic Socks (White)
items.selectionTips: Bring at least 10 pairs. Cotton blends or moisture-wicking.

recommendedProducts.name: Darn Tough Tactical Micro Crew
recommendedProducts.reason: Merino wool blend lasts 3× longer than cotton and wicks moisture continuously — dramatically reducing blister risk during daily PT and ruck marches.

items.name: Small Lock (Combination)
items.whyNeeded: Required to secure your wall locker and sensitive items.
items.selectionTips: Combination only — no key locks. Memorize the combination.

items.name: Civilian ID and Documents
items.description: Social security card, birth certificate, state ID
items.whyNeeded: Required for in-processing and DEERS enrollment.
items.selectionTips: Bring originals in a sealed envelope. They will be collected and secured.

items.name: Foot Powder
items.description: Gold Bond or similar anti-fungal foot powder
items.selectionTips: Use daily after showers. Prevents athlete's foot and trench foot.

items.name: Running Insoles
items.selectionTips: Superfeet or Sof Sole are popular choices. Reduce shin splints.

recommendedProducts.name: Superfeet Green Insoles
recommendedProducts.reason: Reduces heel strike impact by up to 40% on hard surfaces — critical for standing at attention on concrete and during long marches.

items.name: Writing Supplies
items.selectionTips: Write letters home. Physical mail is the main communication.

items.name: Cell Phone
items.notes: Phones allowed only during designated times, not during training.

items.name: Civilian Clothing
items.notes: Not permitted during training. Can be stored or shipped home.

items.name: Excessive Cash
items.notes: Bring a debit card. Keep it secured in your wall locker.
